text:
Sometimes things just need time to brew. Sometimes you need to know immediately that it won't work.

Merged 3 PRs today dealing with time:

1. Letting long jobs finish: removed artificial fetch timeouts and bumped the AssemblyAI transcription timeout to 240s. Let the audio process.
2. Failing fast: added validation for chat image model capabilities. If a model doesn't support vision, we tell you right away instead of making you wait for an error.

Patience where it counts, speed where it matters.

Code is open. PRs #11113, #11132, #11139.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #webdev #backend #buildinpublic #devlife
